generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 70% of Americans now support community-based emergency preparedness programs? These initiatives not only strengthen our national security but also empower local communities to handle crises without sacrificing civil liberties. Critics argue they're a waste of resources, but with rising threats, isn't it better to be prepared than caught off guard? #NationalSecurity #CommunityPrep
